data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of automatic notifications to qualified substitutes when a cancellation occurs. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations that such notifications are being sent, nor does it demonstrate the existence of a mechanism to trigger these notifications. The linked use case outlines the need for this functionality but lacks concrete evidence of its implementation, indicating a clear gap in the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of automatic notifications being sent to qualified substitutes upon cancellation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
